posts.text: Perhaps the U.S. Department of Justice should allow the United Kingdom to handle the Epstein investigation and hold all co-conspirators accountable. Then they wouldn't have to worry about covering up for the president. nytimes.com/live/2026/02/19/…

posts.text: Every time we overcome prejudice, discrimination, voter suppression, and other man-made barriers to opportunity, we should remember and thank Rev. Jesse Jackson for working to blaze a trail to the American Dream for all people. May he rest in peace.
posts.quote: Every time we overcome prejudice, discrimination, voter suppression, and other man-made barriers to opportunity, we should remember and thank Rev. Jesse Jackson for working to blaze a trail to the American Dream for all people. May he rest in peace.

posts.text: My sons couldn't believe that I didn't know who Bad Bunny was. But I know this: the halftime show was an amazing celebration of the "shining city on a hill.” Real patriotism is believing in that dream of what America can be.

posts.text:
Ghislaine Maxwell, a convicted child molester and Donald Trump associate, is in a minimum security facility playing with puppies, because she promised to keep her mouth shut.

Remember America, “no lie can live forever.” Stand up for the victims.

posts.text:
In response to Trump's sad post about the Obamas, let me say this:
President and First Lady Obama have more class and intellect in one day than Donald Trump could muster up in a lifetime. Perhaps no one knows that more than him. Had enough yet America?

posts.text: Two U.S. citizens have been killed by ICE agents under extremely questionable circumstances. No investigation, no accountability. All part of the President's attempt to confiscate voter rolls. Believe your eyes and ears and stand up and speak out against what we know is wrong.
posts.quote: Two U.S. citizens have been killed by ICE agents under extremely questionable circumstances. No investigation, no accountability. All part of the President's attempt to confiscate voter rolls. Believe your eyes and ears and stand up and speak out against what we know is wrong.

posts.text: All routine ICE Operations should be suspended. Two Americans are dead. The use of deadly force is not a time to "just move on." More may be killed. Suspend and investigate. This is out of control. nbcnews.com/news/us-news/min…
posts.quote: All routine ICE Operations should be suspended. Two Americans are dead. The use of deadly force is not a time to "just move on." More may be killed. Suspend and investigate. This is out of control. nbcnews.com/news/us-news/min…

posts.text: Immigration laws matter. HOWEVER, due to the recent shootings and questions about ICE’s authority, recruiting, and training,  all routine operations in communities should be suspended until an independent review. ICE should always coordinate with local law enforcement.
posts.quote: Immigration laws matter. HOWEVER, due to the recent shootings and questions about ICE’s authority, recruiting, and training,  all routine operations in communities should be suspended until an independent review. ICE should always coordinate with local law enforcement.

posts.text: A young mother has been shot and killed. Everyone, regardless of the outcome of a “legitimate” investigation, should feel bad about that, including POTUS, VP, and Ice. Contrary to the VP’s reckless claim, ICE does not have “absolute immunity.” Heaven help us.

posts.text:
Sad to hear about the tragic shooting in Minneapolis. 
It’s early and a thorough investigation must take place. However, based on what I do know so far, if this shooting happened on my watch as a police chief, I would be extremely worried about the justification and the outcome.

posts.text: January 6, 2021 is a dark stain on American history. The attack on a free and fair election, and the police who tried to protect us, was orchestrated by President Trump. Any attempt to tell a different story is a lie. May God bless the police officers who remembered their oath that day and have mercy on those who did not.

posts.text: Today. Americans of all parties came together to honor the 46th Vice President. He understood that his oath was to the constitution, not to a person or party.

posts.text: Today House Republicans found out there is life after going against the President when he is dead wrong. I pray the Senate will follow the House’s lead and vote for America's women and girls. Release the files; hold pedophiles accountable. bloomberg.com/news/articles/…

posts.text:
In 2016, then candidate Trump said “I could stand in the middle of Fifth Avenue and shoot somebody and I wouldn’t lose any voters.”

But surely we would not turn our heads as he covers for pedophiles and covers up crimes against underage girls.

Would we?

posts.text:
In July, Trump's DOJ and FBI said there was no evidence to charge people based on the Epstein files.

Turns out Trump is all over them.

Now of course he's calling for an investigation (of his enemies) which would block the release of more emails. 

America, don’t fall for it.

posts.text: Scott, you are misinformed. Many republicans support the ACA. Let’s get pass the theater and have a real conversation. I would love to have a meaningful conversation.

posts.text: Republican representatives from Florida are hosing their own constituents with higher health care costs. Don't be fooled, this catastrophe is all for the ego of the president. Your health care shouldn't be their plaything. nytimes.com/2025/10/25/us/ob…

posts.text: POTUS just pardoned George Santos, convicted of fraud. At the same time, he's illegally pushing the prosecution of Lisa Cook and Letitia James for alleged fraud. When guilt or innocence depends on a president who punishes people who honor their oaths, we no longer have Justice.
